unit.note: shared/tests/ (2227) + plugins/shipwright-compliance/tests/ (467) + plugins/shipwright-iterate/tests/ (237) + integration-tests/ (110). All green. 23 NEW tests added: test_attach_commit_to_event.py (7) + test_audit_snapshot.py (13) + finalize_iterate (5) + generate_handoff_on_stop (1). test_audit_group_e.py rewritten (~8 tests) for snapshot contract. test_audit_staleness.py trimmed (~14 tests retained for normalize + determinism; ~6 stub-renderer tests deleted).

integration.note: No integration surface; covered via integration-tests/ unit-style suite.

surface_verification.note: F0.5 cli surface — 43 compliance audit tests covering the snapshot-provenance rewrite. Single attempt, no retries. The broader shared+iterate+integration tests pass separately (verified at F0); pytest conftest discovery prevents mixing shared/tests + plugins/*/tests in one invocation, so F0.5 narrows to the compliance-audit subset which directly verifies the iterate's ACs (AC-1 through AC-5).
